prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年中山大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约5529名、5435名、7198名、8257名、7293名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2023年较2022年后移约1763名，2024年继续后移至8257名，2025年略有回升至7293名，近两年波动幅度较大，2025年基准位次约7293名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021年182人、2022年172人、2023年175人、2024年178人、2025年181人，2026年计划增至185人，较2025年小幅扩招约2.2%，扩招对竞争有轻微缓解作用，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中山大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第11–13名区间（2026年第13名），属于国内顶尖高校梯队，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年高考周期内中山大学声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端（论文数据存疑、多名师生被处理）、学校管理回应及校园安全事件，共11起事件中负面7起。2025年声誉评价为偏正面（报考热情回升），但2026年负面舆情增多可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制。抖音热度排名第29（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平。历史投档异常方面，2022年多省爆冷断档（中关注），2023年投档线异常偏低（低关注），2024–2025年关注度中等，断档历史可能使部分考生持观望态度；中山大学第五轮学科评估A-及以上学科达23个，包括生态学A+、工商管理A+、临床医学A-、计算机科学与技术A-、数学A、物理学A、生物学A等，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化均为高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学为推荐，法学为分化观望。中山大学在上述热门领域均有强势学科布局，有助于维持报考热度。山东省2026年普通高考考生总数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约5.7%，考生规模扩大使整体竞争加剧。；中山大学位于广东省广州市，在山东省属外省招生。2025年该校在山东省招生109人，占全国总招生598人的约18.2%，山东省是该校第二大生源省份（仅次于江苏省），招生占比较高说明该校对山东考生有稳定的招生倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势（2025年较2024年明显回升）、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+4人）、山东省考生总数增加约5.7%、学校声誉偏负面（学术不端舆情可能抑制部分报考）、优势学科与热门专业高度契合（计算机/临床医学/电子信息高热）等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准7293名基础上略有后移。扩招和声誉负面使位次数字增大，但学校顶尖层次和热门专业吸引力形成支撑。预测最低位次约7420名，波动区间6920–7920名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制）
- 计算机类（广州）（计算机科学与技术、信息与计算科学）
- 金融学（金融学、计算机双学士学位项目）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（通信工程、微电子科学与工程、光电信息科学与工程、电子信息科学与技术）
- 法学（法学、英语双学士学位项目）
- 数学类（广州）（数学与应用数学、统计学）
- 网络空间安全（含鸿网创新班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工商管理类（广州）（工商管理、会计学）
- 化学类（化学、高分子材料与工程、应用化学）
- 公共管理类（行政管理、政治学与行政学）
- 历史学（广州）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约7420名，区间6920–7920名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<6920名）可重点冲击临床医学八年制、计算机类等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>7920名）应以三档专业保底为主，争取二档中位次较低的专业。中山大学学科评估A类学科众多，专业选择丰富，建议结合个人兴趣与学科评估等级综合决策。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Sun Yat-sen University in Shandong Province comprehensive category were approximately 5529, 5435, 7198, 8257, and 7293, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2023, it shifted back by about 1763 places compared to 2022, continued to shift back to 8257 in 2024, and slightly recovered to 7293 in 2025, with significant fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 7293. The enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Shandong Province was 182 in 2021, 172 in 2022, 175 in 2023, 178 in 2024, and 181 in 2025. The plan for 2026 increases to 185, a slight expansion of about 2.2% compared to 2025, which slightly alleviates competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has been stable in the 11th to 13th range in recent years (13th in 2026), placing it among the top-tier domestic universities, with strong appeal to high-scoring students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (questionable paper data, multiple faculty and students disciplined), school management responses, and campus safety incidents, with 7 negative out of 11 total incidents. The 2025 reputation evaluation was slightly positive (rebound in application enthusiasm), but the increase in negative public opinion in 2026 may somewhat suppress some students' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 29 (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level. Regarding historical admission anomalies, there were cold spots and gaps in multiple provinces in 2022 (medium attention), abnormally low admission lines in 2023 (low attention), and moderate attention in 2024–2025. The history of cold spots may lead some students to adopt a wait-and-see attitude. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Sun Yat-sen University has 23 disciplines rated A- or above, including Ecology A+, Business Administration A+, Clinical Medicine A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Mathematics A, Physics A, Biology A, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, strongly attracting applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended, Clinical Medicine and Stomatology are recommended, and Law is divided with wait-and-see. Sun Yat-sen University has strong disciplinary layouts in these popular fields, helping to maintain application enthusiasm. The total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Shandong Province in 2026 is about 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% from about 681,000 in 2025, intensifying overall competition. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, and is an out-of-province enrollment for Shandong. In 2025, the university enrolled 109 students in Shandong, accounting for about 18.2% of the total national enrollment of 598, making Shandong the second largest source province (after Jiangsu Province). The relatively high enrollment proportion indicates a stable enrollment preference for Shandong students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend (significant recovery in 2025 compared to 2024), the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+4 students), the increase in Shandong candidate numbers by about 5.7%, the slightly negative school reputation (academic misconduct public opinion may suppress some applications), and the high alignment between advantageous disciplines and popular majors (Computer Science/Clinical Medicine/Electronic Information are hot), it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift back from the 2025 baseline of 7293. Expansion and negative reputation increase the ranking number, but the top-tier school level and popular major attractiveness provide support. The predicted minimum ranking is about 7420, with a fluctuation range of 6920–7920.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 7420, range 6920–7920. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<6920), you can focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors like Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>7920), you should mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety and strive for Tier 2 majors with lower rankings. Sun Yat-sen University has many A-class disciplines in discipline evaluations, offering a rich selection of majors. It is recommended to make decisions based on personal interests and discipline evaluation grades.
